title: TPS Detective
description: Shows tick statistics via gui & detects server freeze (0 TPS)
body:
This thing shows tick statistics and the last task server was busy doing when the server stops responding (frozen world, 0 TPS).

The snapshot screen can also be triggered by pressing 'O'.

The mod only works in singleplayer and does nothing on dedicated servers.

Tick lag caused by a villager example:
![villager lag simulation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ndd6WzgN/images/fad955ac71f351abd74d9161b5d87c88e93a642e.png)
![overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ndd6WzgN/images/df3bf35bbc9eb5f2f53fff7995b07ef6c1afdeb8.png)
